tools.description: Change user's email to new one or validate existing one.

tools.name: user_change_password
tools.description: Change user's password to new one. User need to be logged in to use this endpoint.

new_password.title: New password
new_password.description: At least 8 characters long and has at least 1 digit and 1 letter.

new_password_again.title: New password again
new_password_again.description: To prevent typos in new password

tools.name: user_change_phone_number
tools.description: Change user's phone number to new one.

tools.name: user_validate_new_email
tools.description:
Send validation code to email address. User need to be logged in to use this endpoint.
Received validation code is used with api/v1/user/<UUID>/change-email.
Can be used to validate new email or user's existing email

[INFO]
- Emails are unique so you can't use email that is already used by some user
- Validation code sent to email is valid 2 minutes from creation

tools.name: user_validate_new_phone_number
tools.description: Send validation code to phone number. User need to be logged in to use this endpoint.
